prompt: Editorial Instagram carousel slide, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350). Deep forest green background #000F08, no gradient, perfectly flat. Top of canvas: small badge with text 'CASO REAL' in DM Sans Regular 400, uppercase, letter-spacing +0.12em, 14px, color gold #C89136, badge has thin 1px gold outline border, rectangular, sits with 80px top padding centered. Main composition center-left: large editorial headline in two lines, DM Sans Light 300, 64px, line-height 1.0, letter-spacing -0.02em, color #f8fffc. Line 1: 'Cansaço crônico.' Line 2: 'Exames perfeitos.' — the words 'Exames perfeitos.' rendered in Georgia italic in same color and size as pivot phrase. Below headline with 56px gap: three short body lines in DM Sans Light 300, 18px, line-height 1.5, color #f8fffc at 85% opacity: 'M., 42, executivo paulistano.' / 'Treina 4x na semana. Dorme 6h ok.' / 'Há 14 meses operando no esgotado.' Generous negative space, asymmetric layout left-aligned with 90px left margin. Magazine-grade editorial typography precision. ABSOLUTELY NO photographs of people, NO illustration of a tired executive, NO drop shadows, NO decorative icons, NO clock or sleep or training icons, NO emoji, NO gradient backgrounds, NO test tubes, NO generic stock graphics.
notes: Hook slide. Pure typography. Restraint is the design.

prompt: Editorial Instagram carousel slide, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350). Deep forest green background #000F08, perfectly flat. Composition: large pull-quote centered vertically, left-aligned, 90px left margin, 90px right margin. Quote in Georgia italic 28px, line-height 1.45, color #f8fffc, with a thin vertical gold #C89136 bar (2px wide, full quote height) flush left of the text block, 24px gap between bar and text. Quote text exactly three short paragraphs: 'Acordo cansado. Treino cansado.' / 'Reuniões à tarde com a cabeça em câmera lenta.' / blank line / 'Fiz tudo o que mandaram fazer.' / 'Mas o corpo segue avisando que algo está fora.' — render the words 'câmera lenta' in slightly heavier italic emphasis. Below quote with 64px gap: small attribution lines in DM Sans Light 300, 18px, color #f8fffc at 75% opacity, left-aligned to quote: '— 14 meses de sintoma.' / 'Três check-ups. Nenhuma resposta.' Maximum editorial restraint, magazine spread aesthetic, generous whitespace. ABSOLUTELY NO photographs, NO illustrations of people, NO decorative quotation mark glyphs (only the thin gold vertical bar), NO drop shadows, NO icons, NO emoji, NO background texture or gradient, NO test tubes.

Editorial Instagram carousel slide, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350). Deep forest green background #000F08, perfectly flat. Top section, 100px top padding, left-aligned at 90px left margin: small label in DM Sans Regular 400, uppercase, 14px, letter-spacing +0.12em, color #f8fffc at 70% opacity: 'CORTISOL SALIVAR — RITMO 24H'. Below with 48px gap: massive display number '22,4' in DM Sans Light 300, 112px, color gold #C89136, letter-spacing -0.03em. Immediately right of the number, baseline-aligned, smaller italic label in Georgia italic 22px, color #f8fffc at 80% opacity: 'μg/dL ao acordar'. Center of canvas: clean editorial data table, two columns of values plus row labels, three rows. Header row in DM Sans Regular 400, 16px, color #557D6D teal: blank | 'Faixa laboratório' | 'Faixa funcional'. Row 1: 'Acordar' | '7 – 28' | '13 – 18'. Row 2: '22h' | '< 7,5' | '< 3'. Body cells in DM Sans Regular 400, 16px, color #f8fffc. Thin 1px horizontal divider lines between rows in #557D6D teal at 40% opacity, no vertical lines, no cell fills. Table left-aligned to 90px margin, total width ~75% canvas. Below table with 56px gap: body paragraph in DM Sans Light 300, 18px, line-height 1.5, color #f8fffc at 85% opacity: 'O exame anual mede uma vez, em jejum, pela manhã.' / 'Não captura o ritmo. E é no ritmo que mora a fadiga.' — render the word 'ritmo' in Georgia italic on both occurrences. Bottom of canvas, 60px from bottom edge, left-aligned: tiny source citation in DM Sans Regular 400, 11px italic, color #f8fffc at 50% opacity: 'Fonte: Adam EK, Kumari M. Psychoneuroendocrinology, 2009.' Scientific journal precision aesthetic. ABSOLUTELY NO decorative chart or curve graphic, NO decorative line graphs, NO drop shadows, NO icons, NO test tubes, NO laboratory imagery, NO cells background fill, NO photographs.
notes: Biomarker reveal. Number is the hero. Table is editorial.

prompt: Editorial Instagram carousel slide, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350). Deep forest green background #000F08, perfectly flat. Top section, 100px top padding, left-aligned at 90px left margin: small label in DM Sans Regular 400, uppercase, 14px, letter-spacing +0.12em, color #f8fffc at 70% opacity: 'PROTOCOLO · 60 DIAS'. Three numbered protocol items stacked vertically, 56px vertical gap between items, left-aligned at 90px margin. Each item structured as: large number in DM Sans Light 300, 40px, color gold #C89136, letter-spacing -0.02em (format '01.', '02.', '03.'), followed on same line by body text in DM Sans Light 300, 18px, line-height 1.5, color #f8fffc. Item 01: 'Janela de luz solar 7h–8h, 15 min, sem óculos escuros.' Item 02: 'Carga de treino reduzida em 30% nas primeiras 3 semanas. Volta gradual.' Item 03: 'Última refeição 3h antes de dormir. Quarto a 19°C.' Body text wraps to 2 lines, indented to align with text start (not number). Below protocol items with 72px gap: two-line statement in DM Sans Light 300, 18px, line-height 1.5, color #f8fffc at 85% opacity: 'Sem suplementação. Sem fármaco.' / 'Reset do eixo, não medicação do sintoma.' — render the word 'eixo' in Georgia italic. ABSOLUTELY NO green check marks, NO bullet points, NO icons of sun or food or thermostat or sleep, NO illustration, NO photographs, NO drop shadows, NO test tubes, NO decorative dividers.
notes: Protocol slide. Gold numerals replace bullets.

prompt: Editorial Instagram carousel slide, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350). Deep forest green background #000F08, perfectly flat. Below label with 16px gap, single line composed of two numbers separated by an arrow: '22,4' in DM Sans Light 300, 36px, color #f8fffc at 60% opacity, then arrow '→' in 36px color #557D6D teal, then '15,8' in DM Sans Light 300, 72px, color gold #C89136, letter-spacing -0.03em, baseline-aligned. Below quote with 56px gap: two closing lines in DM Sans Light 300, 18px, line-height 1.5, color #f8fffc at 85% opacity: 'O exame anual não te entrega o ritmo.' / 'O painel Longevify entrega.' — render 'ritmo' in Georgia italic. ABSOLUTELY NO logo glyph, NO Longevify text rendering, NO check marks, NO icons, NO decorative arrows beyond the simple → character, NO photographs, NO drop shadows, NO test tubes.
